criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on app stores (e.g., Google Play, Apple App Store).
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads across all platforms.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level of AI integration for features like budgeting, investing, and financial advice.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, official websites

criteria.name: Security Features
criteria.description: Strength of security measures such as encryption, multi-factor authentication, and data privacy policies.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, official websites, security audits

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's user interface.
criteria.sources: User reviews, expert reviews, usability testing

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Range and depth of features offered, such as budgeting tools, investment options, and financial planning.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, official websites

criteria.name: Customer Support
criteria.description: Quality and responsiveness of customer support.
criteria.sources: User reviews, official websites, customer support forums

criteria.name: Integration with Financial Institutions
criteria.description: Number and variety of financial institutions supported for account syncing and transactions.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, official websites, user reviews

criteria.name: Pricing and Subscription Models
criteria.description: Cost of the app, including any subscription fees or in-app purchases.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, official websites, user reviews

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: Frequency of app updates and new feature releases.
criteria.sources: App store update history, official blogs, release notes
